hero.title: Descubre el Corazón de la Danza Tanguera
hero.subtitle: Feel the Rhythm of the City

about.title: About Me
about.description:
My name is María Inés. I am a tango dancer and the creator of The Authentic Tango Experience, a cultural experience I have been developing for nearly ten years.

I fell in love with tango the very first night I stepped into a milonga. Over time, that relationship grew far beyond the dance floor. I've written a book of short stories set in milongas, documented this world through photography, and shaped this experience from a deep desire to share tango as a living, deeply rooted cultural expression.

This experience was born from a life lived inside tango.

My role is to guide you through the world of tango and the place where it is socially danced — the milonga — with clarity and sensitivity. I explain the codes and etiquette, the music and its history, and the emotional language of the embrace as it unfolds in a real milonga, so tango becomes readable, human, accessible, and meaningful.

private.title: Cultural tango walking tour and milonga experience
private.description:
We begin by walking through the streets of Buenos Aires, where tango was born — uncovering its history, its poets, its music, and the neighborhoods that gave it life. As we explore the city on foot, tango reveals itself not only as a dance, but as a profound cultural expression rooted in everyday life.

The tour culminates in a visit to an authentic milonga, where we witness social tango as it truly is: spontaneous, intimate, and rich in codes and traditions. Watching the dancers and decoding the etiquette with the guidance of a local expert turns the experience into something uniquely insightful.

More than a show, this is a deep, guided immersion into the living culture of tango.
private.includes: Included: English & Spanish guide, Glass of wine/soda/coffee, milonga entry

group.title: Cultural tango walking tour and milonga experience + group class
group.description:
We begin by walking through the streets of Buenos Aires, where tango was born — discovering its history, its poets, its music, and the neighborhoods that gave it life. As we explore the city on foot, tango reveals itself not only as a dance, but as a profound cultural expression rooted in everyday life.

The tour continues with a visit to an authentic milonga, where we witness social tango in its true essence: spontaneous, intimate, and rich in codes and traditions. Upon arrival, participants join a group class alongside other foreigners or local regulars — a fun and unique moment that allows them to experience tango through their own body and movement. During the class, the guide will accompany them as a translator, partner, and support, ensuring that everyone feels comfortable and included.

After the class, guests may choose to try their first basic steps on the dance floor with real milongueros or just sit and observe the unfolding of the milonga while they uncover the unspoken codes and rich traditions of this quintessential porteño ritual with the help of their local guide and expert, who provides context, stories, and insights to decode what's happening on and off the dance floor.

More than a show, this is a deep, guided immersion into the living culture of tango.
group.includes: Included: English & Spanish guide, Glass of wine/soda/coffee, milonga entry, group class

educational.title: Educational
educational.description:
Tango as an Educational and Cultural Experience Proposal for bilingual and international schools

Cultural exchange is one of the main goals of bilingual schools that promote international programs. This proposal offers an immersive experience into one of the most iconic expressions of both Argentine and porteño identity: tango.

The activity combines historical storytelling, direct interaction with authentic tango spaces—such as milongas, live performances, and exhibitions—and, why not, a truly unforgettable moment: taking a tango class with classmates or locals, as part of an enriching city experience.

This tour is more than just an educational outing: it is a gateway into one of the most genuine expressions of Argentine culture, presented in a language that is accessible, dynamic, and engaging for young people.

Ideal for secondary or upper-level students, and adaptable to the age, language, and educational goals of each institution.

corporate.title: Corporate
corporate.description:
Tango as a Cultural Experience for Companies and International Delegations

An authentic and memorable proposal in the heart of Buenos Aires

Cultural experiences are increasingly valued by companies welcoming international clients, business partners, or official delegations. This proposal invites guests to discover tango —one of the most iconic expressions of Argentine and porteño identity— through an authentic, immersive, and engaging approach.

The program includes a historical and cultural introduction to tango, visits to venues where the tradition is still alive —such as milongas, live music performances, and exhibitions— and the opportunity to end the experience with a truly unforgettable moment: a tango class shared with locals, in an elegant and relaxed atmosphere.

More than a tourist activity, this is a cultural immersion designed to inspire, connect, and leave a lasting impression. Ideal as part of a corporate hospitality program, bilateral meeting agenda, or official visit itinerary.

Fully adaptable in duration, language, and style to suit the needs of each company or delegation.

university.title: University
university.description:
Tango as a Cultural and Educational Experience

Proposal for Universities and International Exchange Programs

Within the framework of internationalization and cultural outreach programs, this proposal invites university students to experience an immersive tango experience, one of the most emblematic manifestations of Buenos Aires and Argentine identity.

The itinerary includes an introduction to the historical and social context of tango, visits to spaces where this tradition remains alive — milongas, exhibitions, live music — and the opportunity to participate in a practical tango class as part of a collective and reflective experience in the city.

More than a recreational activity, this is an intercultural educational opportunity that promotes encounter, understanding of other cultural expressions, and appreciation of local traditions from a critical and experiential perspective.

Designed especially for international or local university students in exchange programs, adaptable in language, duration, and depth according to the academic profile of each group.

booking.description: Select a date and time that works for you

ebook.title: Discover the inner world of tango through my book Entre La Patagonia y el Tango
ebook.description:
This book was born spontaneously—from a hilarious anecdote starring a dear friend, from the irresistible urge to dance tango day and night, and above all, from a deep longing to be at the milonga even when I was miles away, living for a time in Patagonia.

Immersing myself in writing these stories became a kind of milonguero placebo, soothing both my mind and my feet —which, as they wandered along the beaches of Lake Nahuel Huapi in Patagonia, imagined themselves strapped into high heels, gliding across the dance floor, swept away by the music and the tango embrace.
